violations: argument 'top_k' must be integer, got str ('10')

results.content:
Product Guide — Emberforge Solo.
The Emberforge Solo is part of our stoves range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Product Guide — Soothflame Solo.
The Soothflame Solo is part of our stoves range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

Zephyra Outfitters Quoting Policy — unspecified models.
When a customer asks for a price quote without naming a specific product model, quote the cheapest in-stock option in the requested category. Always state which model the quote refers to.
